description.content: Headless-browser scraping with proxy rotation, screenshots, and AI extraction.

item.name: Scrape a URL and Return HTML, Screenshot, or JSON

request.name: Scrape a URL and Return HTML, Screenshot, or JSON

description.content:
Fetch a target URL through ScrapingBee's headless browser and proxy network.
Returns rendered HTML by default, or a screenshot/JSON wrapper/markdown/text
depending on the parameters supplied.

query.description: (Required) ScrapingBee account key.
(Required) URL to scrape (must be URL-encoded, include scheme).
Execute JavaScript via headless browser. Defaults to true (5 credits).
JSON-encoded scenario describing browser interactions (clicks, fills, scrolls, waits).
Additional rendering delay in milliseconds.
CSS or XPath selector to wait for before returning.
Browser state condition to wait for.
Use residential premium proxy pool (10 credits without JS, 25 with JS).
Use the stealth proxy pool for high-protection sites (75 credits).
ISO 3166-1 country code for proxy geolocation.
Block advertisements during rendering.
Block heavy resources (images, fonts, css) to speed up rendering.
Semicolon-separated cookie list to send with the request.
Forward Spb-* prefixed headers to the target site.
Return a screenshot of the page instead of HTML.
Capture a full-page screenshot, not just the viewport.
CSS selector to limit the screenshot region.
Wrap response in JSON format with metadata.
Return plain text content instead of HTML.
Return content as Markdown.
Return the pre-JavaScript HTML source.
JSON-encoded extraction rules (CSS or XPath selectors).
Natural-language instruction for AI-powered data extraction.
JSON-encoded AI extraction rules mapping field names to natural-language descriptions.

response.name: HTML, screenshot bytes, JSON wrapper, text, or markdown depending on params.

item.name: Scrape a URL with a POST Body

request.name: Scrape a URL with a POST Body

description.content:
Same as the GET variant but accepts a request body that is forwarded to
the target URL as either form-encoded data or JSON.

query.description: (Required) ScrapingBee account key.
(Required)

response.name: Response forwarded from the target site.

description.content: Structured Google SERP results (web, news, maps, images).

item.name: Run a Google Search and Return Structured SERP JSON

request.name: Run a Google Search and Return Structured SERP JSON

description.content:
Execute a Google query via ScrapingBee's dedicated Search API and receive
structured JSON results: organic listings, knowledge graph, featured
snippets, news, maps, image results, related searches, and ads.

query.description: (Required) ScrapingBee account key.
(Required) Query string as typed into the Google search bar.
Which Google vertical to query.
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for result localization.
Result language (hl parameter equivalent).
Number of results to return.
Result page number.
Render Google as desktop or mobile.
Additional Google query parameters (gl, hl, num, start, etc.).
Use the cheaper, faster light request mode.
Return the full SERP HTML alongside the structured payload.

response.name: Structured Google SERP response.

description.content:
ScrapingBee is a France-based web scraping API that handles headless browsers,
proxy rotation, anti-bot defenses, and CAPTCHA solving so developers can
extract data from any website with a single API call. This OpenAPI describes
the core HTML scraping endpoint and the dedicated Google Search SERP API.
Source: https://www.scrapingbee.com/documentation/


Contact Support:
 Name: ScrapingBee Support
